items.title: Trump Trade 'Deals'
items.description: Recent comments by Donald Trump seemed to confirm what he implied in his earlier remarks: the â90 trade deals in 90 daysâ he promised generally did not refer to formal trade treaties.

items.title: DEMZ: Can This Politically Charged ETF Keep Beating The S&P 500?
items.description: DEMZ holds S&P 500 companies that contribute roughly 75% or more to Democratic causes and candidates. Read why I've assigned a neutral hold rating to DEMZ ETF.

items.title: U.S. Vs. EU Stocks: Sentiment Vs. Fundamentals
items.description: U.S. GDP growth projections remain higher than Europe's, favoring U.S. equities despite trade tensions. Click here to read what investors need to know.

items.title: Several Models Highlight The Case For Downgrading The 10-Year Return Outlook For U.S. Stocks
items.description: A review of history suggests that the surge in rolling 10-year performance for the S&P 500 Index over the past decade or so will give way to softer results in the years ahead. Click to read.

items.title: Don't Get Caught In The Bull Trap
items.description: Understand market fundamentals, technical analysis, and Fed policy which impact the current market rally on SPX and Magnificent Seven. Read why I'm not on-board with the stock upsurge.
